description_long: This object is a classical violin, featuring a rich, warm brown wooden body with a glossy finish. The front plate displays two elegant f-holes, a black tailpiece, and four visible strings stretching from the tailpiece up to the pegbox. The neck is slender and leads to a scroll at the top, which is intricately carved and houses the tuning pegs. The back of the violin is a darker, polished wood, showing the natural grain and curvature typical of high-quality instruments. The sides are slightly arched, and the instrument lacks a visible chinrest, giving it a traditional appearance.
description: A polished, brown wooden violin with visible strings, f-holes, and a carved scroll, featuring a glossy finish and traditional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the f-holes, tailpiece, four strings, and the full shape of the violin's body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the violin's thin profile, arched body, and the scroll at the top of the neck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dark, polished wooden back and the neck extending to the scroll.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same thin profile and scroll, with the body curvature visible.
